title: AI Assistant chat panel does not render model responses (wire-protocol drift)

steps.description: Align chat.js event listeners + _handleEvent payload extraction + _loadHistory with opencode 1.15 wire shape (properties.*; {info, parts}); preserve all six session-continuity invariants
Review S01: wire-protocol alignment with INTERESTING_EVENTS, payload accessors, history reload, session-continuity invariants
Add tests/dashboard/test_chat_panel_event_protocol.py: contract test pinned to INTERESTING_EVENTS; payload-accessor regression; _loadHistory shape regression; six continuity invariants
Review S03: assertion strength (I003 lesson), RED evidence, coverage of every design TDD test name
Cross-step global review: AC traceability matrix, cross-file consistency between chat.js accessors and test assertions, session-continuity audit
QV: Browser verification — send a prompt and confirm assistant reply renders; refresh and confirm history reloads; multi-turn session continuity; no console errors
Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill
